program: Registered Boundary Flux / Perfect Return Cell / Thalean proof filling
working_rules: Do not treat animation as evidence.
Do not treat upstairs/downstairs as proof until finite predicates exist.
Prefer small scripts and JSON receipts over prose-only assertions.
Every proof attempt should emit source inputs, finite predicate, generated artifact, validator, receipt, and boundary note.
first_task: Build the register-map candidate ledger for Gap A.

gaps.name: chamber_register_map
current_evidence: K900-native WXYZTIW collision bound exists without chamber-register input.
Chamber-facing comparison is suggestive, not yet lawful.
A lawful map between K900 slots and chamber grammar support labels remains missing.
gaps.missing_theorem_statement: There exists a lawful finite map from K900/G15 role slots to chamber grammar support labels that explains the selected WXYZTIW branch triple, or a finite obstruction proves the available public predicates are insufficient.
gaps.proposed_finite_predicate: A register map R preserves triangle/mate-pair structure and recovers the selected branch triple under row-aware M-incidence.
validator_plan: emit exact/pass, ambiguous, or fail receipt
gaps.likely_failure_mode: Public predicates reduce the key space but do not uniquely recover the selected branch triple without row-aware incidence.

gaps.name: role_relative_branch_law
current_evidence: Apre has shared W-X-Y stem and shared I-W return.
The three branches differ only at central Z-T.
Role-relative pattern keeps the three-way class while rejecting tested local sign tampers.
gaps.missing_theorem_statement: The Apre branch triple is exactly the preimage of a K900-native role-relative closure predicate, with minimal assumptions stated.
minimal_input_artifacts: role order WX, XY, YZ, ZT, TI, IW
gaps.proposed_finite_predicate: TopLock(WXYZTIW): role pattern plus aggregate trace signature selects exactly the three base witnesses and six oriented presentations.
validator_plan: record selected base cycles and oriented presentations
gaps.likely_failure_mode: The exact predicate works, but its minimality is not unique or depends on the imported triangle reference.

gaps.name: cocycle_source_derivation
current_evidence: Active aligned cocycle passes public C1-C4 checks.
60 directed transport cocycle edge records validate.
Candidate lift passes old checker bundle.
Strict origin writer audit found no strict cocycle data writer.
gaps.missing_theorem_statement: The active aligned cocycle is derivable from named source inputs by a strict finite writer, or the current payload is validated-but-not-source-derived.
gaps.proposed_finite_predicate: A strict writer must produce the 30-edge cocycle and sign convention from source artifacts only, with no hand-filled edge table.
validator_plan: run candidates in isolated output directories
compare edge set, sign counts, C1-C4, and hash against active aligned payload
emit closed-source derivation receipt or open-gap theorem note
gaps.likely_failure_mode: A script reproduces the table but depends on an aligned bridge or manual source rather than a strict derivation.

gaps.name: inscription_station_invariant
current_evidence: I is interpreted as the inscription station.
This role grammar is recorded but not yet proved as a finite invariant.
gaps.missing_theorem_statement: I is distinguished by a finite predicate in the validated projection/cocycle structure, or I remains an interpretive inscription label.
gaps.proposed_finite_predicate: Inscription(I): I is uniquely selected by turnaround/closure behavior and measurable cocycle or return-signature change.
validator_plan: compare Mode 1 and Mode 2 return signatures
record whether I remains uniquely selected
null_or_control: same path length with different turnaround
gaps.likely_failure_mode: I is distinguished by chosen path syntax, not by invariant structure.

gaps.name: g60_to_g900_relation
current_evidence: G60 is the source object for the cell.
G900 is an admitted local theorem signature, not active rendered cell.
The transition from projection cell to located G900 fiber is not yet proved.
gaps.missing_theorem_statement: A Perfect Return Cell projection corresponds to a specified fiber or role component in the G60 -> G15 x G60 -> G900 tower, with stated coupling obligations.
gaps.proposed_finite_predicate: A cell is admissible as a projection fiber only if it names source object, projection path, carrier relation, validation receipt, and boundary.
validator_plan: build relation ledger from G60 source to projection cell to G15 slot role to G900 carrier position
require every arrow to cite a source artifact
emit located, ambiguous, or unlocated status
null_or_control: G900 context with no fiber relation
gaps.likely_failure_mode: The current cell is source-bound and validated, but not yet located as a specific G900 fiber.
